tasks.description: Review a candidate transition bundle reference against Triad-enforced admissibility. Emits a structured review report and receipt. Does not install files.
tasks.notes: M10.5 review task. Does not install. Apply is a separate future task.

tasks.description: Apply a previously reviewed and approved candidate transition bundle. Requires a passing ALLOW_CANDIDATE_REVIEW receipt before apply is permitted. Installs files under allowed_paths only.
tasks.stop_condition: Install decision emitted and receipt written
tasks.notes: Declared but not implemented. Do not invoke until M11 implementation is complete.

tasks.description: Governed apply/review gate. Evaluates an apply request against Triad-enforced admissibility before any execution. Emits a structured review decision and receipt. ALLOW proceeds. DENY and DEFER halt.
tasks.stop_condition: Decision emitted and receipt written before any apply execution
tasks.notes: M11 apply gate. dry_run=true allows ALLOW even with unresolved Triad. dry_run=false with unresolved Triad produces DEFER.

tasks.description: Run the manually installed Transition Table resolver and CGE ingestion-gate tests. Emits report, receipt, markdown summary, and zipped run evidence.
tasks.stop_condition: Both transition table gate test files executed and report/receipt written
tasks.notes: Use this task after manual installation of core_lite/transition_table and related tests. This task does not ingest or install bundles.

tasks.description: Run a controlled bundle ingestion smoke test outside incoming/. Creates a known-good bundle fixture, runs BundleIngestor directly, and captures exact status/errors.
tasks.stop_condition: Controlled bundle fixture created, BundleIngestor executed, report and receipt written
tasks.notes: Use this to isolate bundle ingestion failures without relying on crowded incoming/ mailbox state.

tasks.description: Dry run of incoming/ cleanup. Reports what would be retained, removed because already dispositioned, or quarantined as unresolved. Makes no filesystem changes.
tasks.command: python scripts/incoming_cleanup.py --incoming-dir incoming --repo-root . --receipt-dir receipts --report-dir reports/current --quarantine-dir quarantine/incoming --dry-run
tasks.notes: Safe to run at any time. Makes no changes. Cleanup never relocates semantic content to final repo destinations.

tasks.description: Scoped cleanup of incoming/. Retains control files and protected diagnostic fixtures, removes only files with existing disposition evidence, quarantines unresolved files, and never relocates semantic content to final repo destinations.
tasks.command: python scripts/incoming_cleanup.py --incoming-dir incoming --repo-root . --receipt-dir receipts --report-dir reports/current --quarantine-dir quarantine/incoming
tasks.stop_condition: incoming/ contains only retained control files, protected diagnostic fixtures, and skipped directories; receipts written for all cleanup decisions
tasks.notes: Run sv002.incoming.cleanup.dry_run first. Cleanup does not move files to final locations; unresolved payloads are quarantined for governed recovery/re-ingestion.

tasks.description: CI smoke check: drive the known-good diagnostic bundle through BatchIngestionController, the M11-wired governed loop, and assert disposition, receipt, and evidence-plane contribution under the real CI runner.
tasks.stop_condition: Smoke report written; exit 0 if the loop fired end-to-end, exit 1 otherwise
tasks.notes: Complements sv002.bundle.ingestion.smoke_test, which tests the BundleIngestor fixture path. This task tests the BatchIngestionController path wired by M11. Run only with the known-good diagnostic bundle whose allowed effects are receipt, report, and evidence emission.

tasks.description: Read-only repo footprint recovery audit. Classifies misplaced, stranded, duplicate, unresolved, and recovery-eligible files without moving, deleting, or installing anything.
tasks.stop_condition: Audit report and receipt written; no filesystem mutations outside report/receipt outputs
tasks.notes: This task observes repo footprint only. It does not move files. Files that need relocation are marked wrap_for_ingestion.

tasks.description: Dry run of repo recovery wrapping. Builds a recovery plan from the repo recovery audit but writes no recovery bundles and does not move or delete originals.
tasks.stop_condition: Recovery wrap plan and receipt written; no recovery bundle files created
tasks.notes: Run after sv002.repo.recovery.audit. This validates what would be wrapped without creating incoming recovery payloads.

tasks.description: Create manifest-bearing recovery bundles for unresolved repo objects. Does not install destination files and does not delete originals. Recovery bundles are routed back through governed ingestion.
tasks.stop_condition: Recovery bundles and receipts written for files classified wrap_for_ingestion; originals retained
tasks.notes: Cleanup may gather and wrap; ingestion decides destination. Original files may only be removed by a later finalize task after successful disposition receipts exist.

tasks.description: Declared but not implemented. Finalize repo recovery by removing originals only after successful ingestion disposition receipts prove recovered objects were installed, admitted, quarantined, or denied.
tasks.stop_condition: Original files removed only if linked recovery disposition receipts exist
tasks.notes: Not implemented in this build. This placeholder prevents premature deletion authority from being inferred.
